name: Freelancer / Consultant
description: Run a one-person business: clients, irregular income, taxes, and a pipeline that never goes empty.

domains.title: Clients
domains.soul:
# Clients

Active engagements, deliverables, and who owes whom what. Keep projects on track and relationships warm; protect your reputation and your time.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Hit every deliverable deadline
- Keep a healthy pipeline of next work
- Follow up on outstanding invoices promptly
prompts: What client deliverables are due this week and what is the next action on each?
Which invoices are outstanding and who should I follow up with?

domains.title: Money
domains.soul:
# Money

Irregular income smoothed into a stable life. Separate business and personal, pay yourself consistently, and keep a buffer for slow months.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Maintain a buffer covering 3-6 slow months
- Pay yourself a steady amount despite lumpy income
- Set aside taxes from every payment
prompts: Given this month's income, how much can I safely pay myself and set aside for taxes?
Is my buffer healthy enough to cover a slow stretch?

domains.title: Taxes
domains.soul:
# Taxes

Self-employment taxes, quarterly estimates, deductible expenses, and clean records for your accountant. Stay ahead so tax season is boring.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Make quarterly estimated payments on time
- Track deductible expenses as they happen
- Keep clean records year-round
prompts: What is my next estimated tax payment and when is it due?
Which recent expenses are deductible and how should I categorize them?

domains.title: Calendar
domains.soul:
# Calendar

Project deadlines, client calls, and the business-development time that is easy to skip when you are busy delivering. Balance the work and the pipeline.
domains.goals:
# Goals

- Protect time for business development every week
- Keep deadlines visible 7 days out
- Avoid overcommitting across concurrent projects
prompts: Give me my week: client deadlines, calls, and one block for finding next work.
Am I overcommitted across my active projects this week?
